nodes.label: Dead Code Sample Fixtures for DeadCodeVisitor Testing  This module provides samp
This function is never called from anywhere.
This class is defined but never instantiated or inherited.
This class is used but has dead methods.
This method is called from other code.
Internal helper that is never called.
A helper function used by the test infrastructure.
A container class to hold mixed used/unused methods.
Outer function that may be called.
Create a calculator with mix of used/unused operations.
Decorator to mark functions as deprecated.
This decorated function is never called.
This decorated class is never used.
Function with conditionally dead code paths.
Process a list using the 'double' lambda.
Bird implementation that is never used.
Reptile implementation that is never instantiated.
This class comes from an 'import' that might be dead.
Data processor with mixed live/dead methods.
A context manager that is never used.
Math operations with mixed method types.
Descriptor that stores values in instance dictionary.
Duck that can fly and swim.
Flying fish that is never used.
Data class that is never instantiated.
Mean value that is never accessed.
Rectangle that implements Drawable but is never used.
Generic container that is never used.
Inner class that is never instantiated.
Priority enum that is never used.
Function that is the end of the chain.
